book_name: Smart Money Concepts (SMC) & Institutional Trading Guide

entry_conditions: Enter a long or short trade promptly via limit orders on a lower-timeframe newly identified order block or fair value gap...
SMC Strategy: Place a buy entry just above a high-probability bullish order block...
risk_management: When implementing the Liquidity Sweep strategy in an uptrend, place the stop loss below the order block...
SMC Risk Management: Set the stop loss strictly below the identified bullish order block zone...
market_structure: A Market Structure Shift (MSS) is marked by a lower low in an uptrend...
A Break of Structure (BoS) occurs when the price breaks through a defined support...
psychology: Retail trading traps are frequently set by institutional Smart Money...
key_concepts: Smart Money Concepts (SMC) vs. Retail Price Action.
Institutional Order Blocks and Breaker Blocks.
Fair Value Gaps (FVG) and Balanced Price Ranges (BPR).
Market Structure Shifts (MSS) vs. Breaks of Structure (BoS).
Smart Money Inducement and Stop-Loss Hunting.
